scripts.build:wasm: cd ../pi-host-web && PATH="$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-aarch64-apple-darwin/bin:$PATH" cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir ../web/public/pkg ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/pi_host_web.wasm && wasm-bindgen --target nodejs --out-dir ../web/pkg ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/pi_host_web.wasm && npm run build:sdk
